title: Contract C05: Scene List + Story → Voice
description: Governs the transition from Stage 6 (Scene List) and Stage 4 (Script) to Stage 9 (Voice & Audio Direction). Defines how script lines are structured as voice lines, what delivery notes are required, how Ma beat silence is encoded, and what recording specifications are mandated.

input.description: Fields required from upstream documents before voice.json can be produced.

required_from_story.purpose: Voice lines are derived 1:1 from script narration lines. Each L[0-9]{3} line_id becomes a voice_line entry.
All pauses from script must appear in voice.json voice_lines as pause-type entries.

required_from_scene.purpose: Voice line estimated start times are derived from scene timecodes.
Scenes with narration_present=false generate voice_line entries with line_type=silence, not narration.
Ma beat scene → voice.json must contain [NO NARRATION] silence entry. Duration must match scene duration.

required_from_story_bible.purpose: All pronunciation guide entries must appear in voice_direction notes. TTS SSML phonemes are set from ssml_phoneme field.

output.description: What voice.json must contain when Stage 9 is complete.

required_fields.purpose: Profile constrains casting and TTS selection. forbidden_styles prevents incorrect register.
Technical specs ensure recording quality is sufficient for production.
Required if TTS is used. Specifies engine, speaking_rate, pause_tag for SSML.
Ordered list of all voice entries. Must include narration, pauses, and silence entries.
Timed read-through validates that actual speaking duration matches expected video duration.
Tracks recording lifecycle. Must be set to 'approved' before timeline assembly.

voice_line_constraints.constraint: Every script.lines narration line must have a corresponding voice_line with line_id_ref = line.line_id
voice_line_constraints.purpose: No script line may be lost in translation to voice.json.

voice_line_constraints.constraint: Every script.lines pause must have a corresponding voice_line with line_type=pause
voice_line_constraints.purpose: Pauses are production instructions, not optional.

voice_line_constraints.constraint: Ma beat scene must have exactly one voice_line with line_type=silence AND pause_before_seconds matching Ma beat duration
voice_line_constraints.purpose: Ma beat duration must be consistent between scene.json and voice.json.

voice_line_constraints.constraint: voice_line.pacing must be one of: slow, very_slow, normal, fast. Default: normal.
voice_line_constraints.purpose: Pacing guides the narrator or TTS. Japan template opening requires very_slow.

voice_line_constraints.constraint: Pronunciation guide terms in voice lines must have delivery_note with SSML phoneme or katakana reading
voice_line_constraints.purpose: Ensures narrator/TTS pronounces technical terms correctly.

ma_beat_encoding.delivery_note: NO NARRATION — Ma beat (間). Do not speak. Hold silence for full duration.
ma_beat_encoding.pause_before_seconds: must equal scene.duration_seconds for the Ma beat scene
ma_beat_encoding.notes: The Ma beat voice entry appears at the position in voice_lines that corresponds to its timecode position in the scene list.

timed_readthrough_instruction.instruction: Narrator must perform a timed read-through before final recording. Expected duration = project.duration_minutes × 60 minus Ma beat duration minus title card duration. Acceptable variance: ±3%.
timed_readthrough_instruction.note_field_for_director: Add timed read-through note to voice_direction.recording_notes

checks.description: All script narration line_ids appear as voice_line line_id_ref values
Ma beat scene has corresponding silence voice_line with correct duration
checks.action_on_fail: Apply FIX-H3: synchronize Ma beat duration across scene.json and voice.json.
Apply FIX-M3: add timed read-through note to voice_direction.md / voice.json.

checks.description: narrator_profile.forbidden_styles does not allow エモーショナル or ドラマティック (for Japanese dark documentary)

checks.action_on_fail: Correct peak_dbfs spec. Out-of-range peak causes clipping or insufficient headroom.

checks.description: All pronunciation guide terms have delivery_note set
checks.action_on_fail: Add delivery_note with pronunciation for each term.

failure_conditions.condition: Ma beat duration in voice.json does not match scene.json
failure_conditions.human_action: Apply FIX-H3: standardize Ma beat to 40 seconds across scene.json, voice.json, and story.md.
Identify missing line_ids. Add corresponding voice_line entries.
Apply FIX-M3: set timed_readthrough_required = true. Add note.

failure_conditions.condition: Forbidden narration style included in narrator_profile.tone_style
failure_conditions.human_action: Apply FIX-L1: update narrator profile phrasing.

recovery_strategy.strategy: Treat scene.json as authoritative. Identify the scene with is_ma_beat=true and its duration_seconds. Update voice.json Ma beat silence entry to match. Do not adjust scene timecodes.
Diff story.script.lines[*].line_id against voice_lines[*].line_id_ref. Generate missing voice_line entries using line text and section pacing defaults.
Review forbidden_styles list. Ensure it prohibits over-theatrical delivery. Prefer prescriptive language: '声は静かで、感情を抑制した語り口' over vague terms.

valid_ma_beat_voice_line.delivery_note: Ma beat (間). 40 seconds of silence. Do not speak. Camera holds on empty corridors.

valid_narration_voice_line.text: かつて、ここに5,259人が暮らしていました。
valid_narration_voice_line.delivery_note: HOOK LINE. Deliver with weight. Do not rush. Let the number land before silence.
